zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Cave於1506年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Sir Richard Cave41歲，母親Margaret Saxby33歲。他於1533年與Barbara Fielding在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1538年在他的家鄉享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Cave was born in 1506, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Cave, was 41 and his mother, Margaret Saxby, was 33. He married Barbara Fielding in 1533, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 32, and was buried in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Barbara Fielding en 1533, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Caveが1506年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Caveは41歳，母Margaret Saxbyは33歳であった。1533年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンでBarbara Fieldingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1538年に故郷で32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cave(이)가 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Cave(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Saxby(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1533년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Barbara Fielding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1538년 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Fielding в 1533 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
